response.justification: Maria has strong technical depth and extensive experience in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and cross-platform development, including mobile apps and CI/CD systems, but lacks clear evidence of formal people management experience and organizational leadership beyond technical contributions and workshops.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools, test runners, and CI/CD infrastructure
Proven track record in mobile app development (iOS/Apple TV) and cross-platform systems
Active contributor to open-source testing tools and organizer of technical workshops
concerns: No explicit mention of people management or team leadership responsibilities in employment history
Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) and lacks clear timeline for 3+ years in technical leadership
Limited evidence of strategic roadmap ownership or organizational change leadership
